login.title: Abokin Hulɗa
login.subtitle: Samun damar dashboard ɗin abokin tarayya
login.legalPrefix: Ta hanyar danna Ci gaba, kun yarda da mu.

register.title: Ƙirƙiri asusu
register.subtitle: Shigar da bayananku don farawa.
register.legalPrefix: Ta hanyar danna Ci gaba, kun yarda da mu.
register.successMessage: Na gode da rajista. Don kunna asusunka, da fatan za a duba imel ɗinku kuma danna mahaɗin tabbatarwa da muka aiko muku.
register.passwordsNoMatch: Kalmomin shiga ba su dace da kalmomin shiga ba.
register.passwordTooShort: Kalmar sirri dole ne ta kasance aƙalla haruffa shida.

twoFactor.title: Tabbatarwa na Abubuwa Biyu
twoFactor.descriptionCode: Shigar da lambar lambobi 6 daga aikace-aikacen ku na tabbatarwa
twoFactor.descriptionRecovery: Shigar da ɗaya daga cikin lambobin dawo da ku don shiga
twoFactor.invalidRecoveryCode: Don Allah shigar da ingantaccen dawo da code (format: XXXXX-XXXXX)
twoFactor.invalidCode: Don Allah shigar da lambar lambobi 6.
twoFactor.helpText: Kuna da matsala? Tuntuɓi taimako don taimako.
twoFactor.invalidCodeError: Lambar da ba ta dace ba. Don Allah a sake gwadawa.

setup.subtitle: Bari mu saita ku. Don Allah ka zaɓi nau'in asusunka don ci gaba.
setup.clinicDescription: Ina wakiltar asibiti ko cibiyar kiwon lafiya tare da likitoci da yawa
setup.labDescription: Ina wakiltar dakin gwaje-gwaje ko cibiyar gwaji
setup.individualDescription: Ni masanin kiwon lafiya ne ko mai bincike.
setup.setupError: Ya kasa kammala saiti. Don Allah a sake gwadawa.

messages.errorFallback: Ya kasa aika imel ɗin sake saiti. Don Allah a sake gwadawa.

success.title: Duba imel ɗinku
success.sentTo: Mun aika da hanyar saita kalmar sirri zuwa {{email}}
success.description: Da fatan za a duba akwatin saƙonku kuma ku bi umarnin don sake saita kalmar sirri. Haɗin ya ƙare a cikin sa'a ɗaya.
success.retry: Shin ba ku karɓi imel ɗin ba? Sake gwadawa

form.title: Ka manta da kalmar sirri?
form.description: Shigar da imel ɗinku kuma za mu aiko muku da hanyar saita.

messages.passwordMismatch: Kalmomin shiga ba su dace da kalmomin shiga ba.
messages.requirementsMissing: Don Allah a cika duk buƙatun kalmar sirri
messages.errorFallback: Ya kasa sake saita kalmar sirri. Wataƙila haɗin ya ƙare.

success.title: Kalmar sirri sake saita nasara
success.description: An sabunta kalmar sirrin ka cikin nasara.

form.title: Sake saita kalmar sirri
form.description: Shigar da sabon kalmar sirri a ƙasa.
form.passwordMustHave: Kalmar sirri dole ne ta haɗa da:
form.requirementsMet: Kalmar sirri ta cika duk buƙatu
form.passwordsNoMatch: Kalmomin shiga ba su dace da kalmomin shiga ba.

messages.invalidLink: Hanyar haɗin tabbatarwa mara inganci. Da fatan za a yi amfani da hanyar haɗi daga imel ɗin ku.
messages.successFallback: An tabbatar da imel ɗinka cikin nasara.
messages.errorFallback: Ba za a iya tabbatar da imel ɗin ba. Wataƙila haɗin ya ƙare.

state.loadingDescription: Da fatan za a jira yayin da muke tabbatar da adireshin imel ɗin ku.
state.successDescription: An tabbatar da imel ɗinka cikin nasara.
state.errorDescription: Ba za mu iya tabbatar da adireshin imel ɗinka ba.

success.nextStep: Yanzu zaku iya shiga cikin asusunku tare da imel ɗinku da kalmar sirri.

error.helpText: Idan wannan ya ci gaba, tuntuɓi goyon baya ko sake yin rajista.
